line_1: How long since I did meditate
line_2: Of Life, of Death, and Future state?

line_1: Come hollow to my ear, I meditate
line_2: Fall'n pile! I ask not what has been thy fate;
On man, in untaught nature's state;

line_1: These pensive strains at evening meditate,
line_2: For me, who musing, Howard, on thy fate,

line_1: With hidden rancour much they meditate,
line_2: Scorning the meanness of their humbler state;
